title: Database initialization and migration utility for Codex
purpose: Provides functions to initialize, migrate, and manage database connections for the Codex application.
module_context: Exports four functions for database management: initDatabase, runMigrations, closeDatabase, and createTestDatabase. Uses better-sqlite3 for database operations and reads schema from a local SQL file.

steps.content: Ensure the parent directory for the database path exists.
Create or open the database connection using better-sqlite3.
Enable foreign key constraints on the database.
Execute database migrations to ensure the schema is up to date.
Construct the path to the schema.sql file in the same directory.
Verify that the schema file exists, throwing an error if it does not.
Read the contents of the schema file as a UTF-8 string.
Execute the schema SQL statements against the database.
Create an in-memory database for testing purposes.
Enable foreign key constraints on the in-memory database.
Read and execute the schema SQL file against the in-memory database.
Return the initialized test database connection.
